no: REINSTALL CYCLES: SubtleD modifies many of the same spell files as SR, SCS, and others. WeiDU will trigger reinstall cascades of those earlier mods when SubtleD is installed after them — expected behavior, not errors, but significantly extends install time. SR-DEPENDENT COMPONENTS: cn:50, 1151, 1505, 1603, 1613, 2151, 2213, 2508, 2518, 2711, 2714 require SR (check dvsrv4here.mrk) — SKIPPED with no log entry if SR not installed. [Olvyn Spells placeholder] WARNING: ANY component adds outdated EEex functions for the new spells no matter what you install, causing massive slowdowns! Ranger/Paladin spell tweaks should go before ToF/SCS NPC customization, may not work with DoF or ToF. New spells and metamagic need to go after other spells and kits but also after SCS and before T&B.

conflicts.reason: Only one real overlap SD cn:2215 (Web applies Slow instead of Hold) and TnT cn:42 (Spider form ignores web) both modify spwi215/spdr201/spin683.spl. Complementary — SD changes the web effect type, TnT makes spider immune regardless. Install SD before TnT. SD cn:40/45/50 (Clones/Invisibility/Haste) SD cn:81 (Familiars) and cn:2108 (Petrification) have no TnT file overlap. TnT cn:51/52/54 (Project Image/Mislead/PnP ProtEvil)
conflicts.myComps: #2215 Web Slow (IN preset) #81 Familiars (IN, no overlap) #2108 Petrification (IN, no overlap) #40 Clones (NOT) #45 Invisibility (NOT) #50 Haste (NOT)
conflicts.theirComps: #42 Spider form (IN, overlaps cn:2215) #46 True Sight (IN, no overlap) #47 Otiluke (IN, no overlap) #48 Greater Command (IN, no overlap) #49 Non-Detection (IN, no overlap) #50 Chaos Shield (IN, no overlap) #55 Grease (IN, no overlap) #51 #52 #54 (NOT in preset)
conflicts.source: Both modify spwi215/spdr201/spin683; SD changes effect type, TnT adds immunity; complementary, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Some spell tweaks overlap with SCS spell changes. Install SubtleD after SCS.
Both modify overlapping spells (Slow Poison, Sunray, Luck, Goodberry, Wondrous Recall, Black Blade of Disaster). Use one or the other for each.
Several components require Spell Revisions to function correctly. These will have no effect without SR installed.
WTP Familiars is incompatible with SubtleD's familiar components.
conflicts.theirComps: #0 WTP Familiars (Requires ToB, BGT, BGEE, BG2EE, IWDEE, or EET

conflicts.reason: cn:2201 (Add Missile Avoidance to Blur) appends SNARE_ARROW to 7EYES.2DA, causing dw_talents cn:1500 APPEND_COL to fail with row count mismatch.

ki.description: 'Cantrips: Level One Cantrips' emits 2-3 'pattern not found' warnings while probing UI.MENU before successfully patching on a later attempt. The component DOES install — these are not errors.

'Cantrips: Level One Cantrips' fails when Rogue Rebalancing is installed first: SubtleD tries to patch RH#ADR25.CRE (RR's creature) but hits String.sub Invalid_argument because the creature layout differs from expectation. Triggers full rollback of this component.
ki.workaround: Install SubtleD BEFORE Rogue Rebalancing, or skip this Cantrips component when using RR.

co.n: Move Symbol: Fear to 7th Level
co.tp2n: Move Symbol: Fear to 7th Level
co.no: INSTALL FAILURE (confirmed from WSETUP.DEBUG line 5865170): "Couldn't add WIZARD_SYMBOL_FEAR_D5 to spell.ids as no slots remain" → FAILURE "Invalid spell number: -1". ROOT CAUSE: WeiDU ADD_SPELL has a hard limit of 99 slots per wizard spell level. Level 7 uses IDs 2701–2799. At install time (SPELL.IDS = 36,919 bytes) all 99 slots were exhausted. WeiDU falls back to ADD_SPELL.IDS and returns -1. SubtleD's tweak_symbol_fear checks that the returned ID is ≥ 0; -1 causes an abort. SLOT CONSUMERS (wizard level 7, 2701–2799): - Vanilla BG2EE: 24 base spells at 2701–2727 (some gaps), plus 2705 duplicated (WARDING_WHIP alias) - IWDification Arcane Pack (cn=30): adds MALAVONS_RAGE (2728), SEVEN_EYES (2729), MASS_CHARM (2730), VESTCAKES_FLOATING_CURSE (2731), STYGIAN_ICE_STORM (2738), and others - Made in Heaven Spells arcane pack (cn=0): adds SUMMON_DAO (2732), SUMMON_MARID (2734), FAERIE_SWORD (2735), DOOM_LEGION (2736), MAGNIFICENT_MANSION (2737), WIZARD_BARRIER, and more — fills 2739–2799 - Weasels! (cn=0): adds WIZARD_SUMMON_WEASELS and related at level 2, but contributes to overall IDS pressure - Multiple other mods with level 6–8 overflow entries This is a hard WeiDU/engine limit, not a bug in SubtleD or the install order per se. WORKAROUNDS: 1. Skip this component — it is purely cosmetic: it edits the spell description to say "Level: 7" and relabels SPWI811's scroll. Symbol: Fear still functions at level 8 in-game. 2. Install SubtleD Spell Tweaks before IWDification and MIH_SP to claim level 7 slots before they fill up. 3. Omit MIH_SP Arcane Pack (cn=0) to free 5+ level 7 slots.

advisories.reason: Different domains (spells vs class abilities) but HLA and CLAB table modifications may overlap. Both used together . Install SubtleD Spell Tweaks before Skills and Abilities.
advisories.myComps: #10 Rebalanced Schools #30 High-Level Spells Penetrate MR #55 Cure Bypass Deflection
advisories.theirComps: #700 PfNW/PfMW #710 New HLAs #720 Updated HLAs #750 Concentration #130 Blade #180 Bard Songs #300 Weapon Styles
advisories.source: tp2 analysis — SubtleD modifies spell behavior, S&A modifies class abilities/HLAs. Overlap limited to shared CLAB/LU 2da files, 2026-03
